news.news: Astellas announced the first patient has been dosed in a Phase 3 registrational study of setidegrasib (ASP3082), a novel KRAS G12D-targeted protein degrader, for the treatment of metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. This marks the first protein degrader targeting a KRAS mutation to enter Phase 3 development.

STORM Therapeutics secured $56 million in Series C financing and announced the dosing of the first patient in a Phase 2 monotherapy trial of STC-15, a first-in-class METTL3 inhibitor, for select sarcoma indications. The funding will support the advancement of this RNA epigenetics therapy.

Hinge Bio announced the first subject dosed in a Phase 1 clinical trial of HB2198, a novel multispecific antibody (GEM-DIMER) targeting both CD19 and CD20 with enhanced dual Fc domains for treating autoimmune diseases like Systemic Lupus Erythematosus. A separate Phase 1 trial in SLE patients is also open to screening.
